turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hello , i've to be quick because i work in a hospital

turns.speaker: model_b

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: although i do not like to work super long hours

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: what do you do for fun

turns.speaker: model_b

turns.content: its was very warm outside today

turns.content: it was . it was so warm though that it melted my cheese i was eating

turns.content: its a beautiful night i love the night air

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: me too . much better for my favorite cheese .

turns.content: my dog will not stop barking
